---
title: "RegEx filename check"
output: html_notebook
params:
  fwd_pat: "_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz" #pattern to identify the forward reads
  raw_data: "raw"
  fname_regex: "-MEL17453A[:digit:]{1,}-AAHLCF3M5_S[:digit:]{1,}_L001_R1_001\\.fastq\\.gz"
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook to evaluate the RegEx pattern to be used to extract the sample names from the FastQ file names. RegEx patterns can be quite complex so this provides a space to check its validity before running the DADA2 notebooks.

Note that the samples names are only extracted from the forward reads.


```{r}
library(stringr)
path <- params$raw_data
fnFs <- sort(list.files(path, pattern = params$fwd_pat, full.names = TRUE, all.files = T))

get.sample.name <- function(fname) {
  stringr::str_remove(basename(fname), params$fname_regex)
}

sample.names <- get.sample.name(fnFs)

data.frame(file_name = basename(fnFs),
           sample_name = sample.names)
```
